title: scabiosa columbaria var. lucida
intro: Scabiosa columbaria var. lucida, also known as the glossy scabious, is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting digestion, as well as possessing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Scabiosa columbaria var. lucida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
